title: classification_result.json -- document type classification result v0.1
description: Assigns a type label to every document in a case. Produced by document-pipeline's checkpoint 1 (OCR + cross-validation + classification, in one vision-model call per document -- see pipeline.md). Consumed by claim-analysis, policy-pipeline, and denial-response for document selection.

document_type_label.description: Display label in Korean (the language of the source documents). e.g. 진단서, 보험사 안내문

pre_flagged.description: True if this document's type was already known at intake (e.g. a flagged insurer-response document) rather than inferred here. When true, classification skips inference and trusts the flag -- see harness-guardrails-dev and denial-response.md.

candidate_types.description: Candidates in descending confidence order. First entry must match predicted_document_type.

evidence_references.description: Evidence for the classification. document_id may be omitted since document context is already unambiguous.
